description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/adv-says-automation-is-agent.json (tolerance case: exam accepts {agent, true} or {wf, true}). The open-ended incident investigation must land on an agent primitive one way or the other; a fixed pipeline with no open-ended step is wrong.

conversation.text: Automate a bot that investigates production incidents end-to-end. Don't build anything yet — first walk me through how you'd set this up.

text: [Do not approve any plan, setup card, or build confirmation.
If the assistant asks a clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer.
Once it has laid out its approach, say you'll think it over and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: The agent proposes handling the open-ended incident investigation with an agent primitive in one of two accepted shapes: an n8n Agent (possibly invoking workflows as tools), or a workflow whose investigation step is an embedded agent; a fixed pipeline with no open-ended step is wrong.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to propose.
